_comment: Labeled set for the A1 routing evaluation. 'path' is the author-judged correct route: 'chat' for single-entity/definitional lookups answerable directly, 'agentic' for relational/multi-hop questions that need graph traversal. Labels are a judgment call and debatable; the point is to compare the PCA router against trivial heuristics on the SAME labels. Balanced 8/8 so the always-chat / always-agentic baselines cap at ~50%.

questions.text: Which papers cite Attention Is All You Need?
How does LoRA relate to BERT and the Transformer?
Which institutions are connected to the authors of FlashAttention?
Trace the lineage from the Transformer to FlashAttention.
Compare BERT and GPT-3 in architecture and training approach.

What topics do the papers citing Attention introduce?
Connect Ashish Vaswani to FlashAttention through the graph.
